overall.description: A first-person journey through a cyberpunk city at night, beginning under a concrete overpass with bright digital billboards, navigating through traffic under neon-lit canopies, passing through a blue-lit tunnel, and emerging into an open waterfront plaza with palm trees overlooking the city skyline. The wet reflective ground and neon signage create a distinctive futuristic atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with a red wall covered in bright digital billboards on the left. The camera moves steadily forward along the asphalt road, passing green metal barriers, with the overpass ceiling creating a sheltered, artificially lit environment.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered overpass into an open intersection where police vehicles are parked on the right. A large wall with colorful graffiti becomes visible as the camera turns right, heading toward a street with a distinctive red neon canopy structure in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Driving under a distinctive red neon canopy that covers the street, the camera moves through moderate traffic alongside futuristic vehicles. The environment is sheltered with artificial red lighting, featuring commercial buildings with Japanese signage on the right and an elevated walkway above.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by blue fluorescent lights, with graffiti-covered walls and a purple vending machine visible on the left. The segment ends as the camera exits the tunnel into a brighter open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with palm trees overlooking city skyline

approaching stairs leading to elevated overlook of the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a wide open plaza with wet reflective tiles, the camera reveals palm trees and a stunning view of the futuristic city skyline in the distance. The scene transitions from enclosed to expansive as the camera approaches stairs leading to a waterfront overlook, with digital billboards lining the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into an expansive waterfront plaza. It begins under a massive concrete overpass beside a red wall of digital billboards, moving steadily along an asphalt road until it exits the shelter into an open intersection marked by parked police vehicles and colorful graffiti. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts beneath a red neon canopy where futuristic traffic flows past Japanese signage and elevated walkways. The environment then tightens as the camera enters a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by blue fluorescent lights and purple vending machines, before finally emerging from the enclosure into a wide plaza of wet reflective tiles. This final transition reveals a stunning view of the futuristic city skyline and palm trees as the camera approaches a waterfront overlook.
